nasb.text: Now therefore, please forgive my sin only this once, and make supplication to the Lord your God, that He would only remove this death from me.”

esv.text: Now therefore, forgive my sin, please, only this once, and plead with the Lord your God only to remove this death from me.”

cnv.text: 現在求你只這一次赦免我的罪，也請你們求告耶和華你們的　神，使這一次的死亡離開我。”

ccb.text: 现在求你饶恕我的罪，就这一次，为我祈求你们的上帝耶和华撤去这场死亡之灾吧！”
